brigg.title: Build a Small Ships Brigg — the mid-tier sailing vessel (Small Ships mod)

ocean_voyage.title: Sail 1000+ blocks across an ocean biome using the Brigg

subtitle.text: The Drowned Civilization built their whole world on the ocean. You conquered their domain. Now sail it.

description: Small Ships adds four ship types:
Cog — smallest, fast, good for rivers
Drakkar — longship style, fastest on open water
The Brigg is the right balance for oceanic exploration.
It holds more cargo than the Cog and moves faster than walking.
Ch08 was about surviving the ocean.
You fought the Aquamirae. You defeated the Elder Guardian. You explored the deep.
The ocean is not a threat now. It is a highway.
Sail 1000 blocks. Get used to the ship controls.
